subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call and recognized thy turning unto Us. We beseech God to aid thee in that which He loveth and is well-pleased with. He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و عرفنا توجهک نسئل الله بان یویدک علی ما یحب و یرضی انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
